titleStmt.title: SII 15.116: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 116. (B.K. No. 102 of 1929-30.) MUTTAGI, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab standing in the village chāvaḍi.
This is dated the 5th regnal year, Khara, Śrāvaṇa-paurṇimā, Sunday, lunar eclipse, corresponding to 1171 A.D., July 18.

It records the renewal of the gift of manneya-vaṇa of the village Maṇiyūru to the god Dakshiṇāmukha Chennakēśava of Muttage by Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara Indarasa, Āhumallarasa and other members of the Śilāhāra family.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: This is engraved after the 51st line of No. 35 above.
div.p:
© mattamavaranvayada samasta praśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ Ina rasanuṁ . Āhu mallarasanuṁ . vīra gōkarasanuṁ . kācarasanuṁ . boṁteya
gōṇarasanuṁ . nāgaladēviya ḍākarasanuṁ . Aladeveḍaṁgana gōṇarasanuṁ . Ammarasanuṁ hulikōḍa koṁtarasanuṁ . hauṭageya cauḍarasanuṁ . Attinūrāhumallarasanuṁ . buṭṭa gōṇarasa
nuṁ . baṁdarasanuṁ . buṭṭaṁmarasanuṁ . dhanasaṁgra Arasanuṁ . nāgārjjunarasanuṁ . gaṁḍama heṁmmāḍiyarasanuṁ . Intī hadineṁṭu saṁtātiyuṁ svasti śrīmat kaḷacuri cakravartti rāyamurāri sōvidēva va
rṣada 5 danaya khara saṁvatsarada śrāvaṇada puṇṇami Ādivāra sōmagrahaṇadalāmaṇiyūra mannayavaṇamaṁ punarbbharaṇaṁ māḍi muttagaya naḍuvaṇa dakṣiṇāmukha
śrī ceṁnakēśavadēvarggābharaṇasahita dhārāpūrvvakaṁ koṭṭaru © svasti samasta dustarā rāti hastimastakasthaḷa vidāraṇamṛgēṁdra pēṁdra . naṭa nagna bhagna gāya
ka vaṁdibṛṁdasaṁtarpaṇa . kalige mukhadarpaṇa . battīsa śastra śāstra pravīṇa . mita saṁtrāṇa . nijabhujō
goṁḍāḍuva parasamaya garbbha sarbbasvasādhaka . sālina baṁmana śiraśchēdaThe rest of the
Digital edition of SII 15.116 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
